targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT contributions_total FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest)),0) AS value

targets.queryText: SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date AS value FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT period_start_date || '..' || period_end_date AS value FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1

targets.queryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', period_end_date || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, contributions_total AS Contributions, withdrawals_total AS Withdrawals, dividends_total_received AS Dividends FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', period_end_date || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, contributions_total AS Contributions, withdrawals_total AS Withdrawals, dividends_total_received AS Dividends FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' ORDER BY period_end_date

targets.queryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', period_end_date || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, trades_total_count AS Trades, margin_net_change AS MarginNet FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' ORDER BY period_end_date
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT (strftime('%s', period_end_date || ' 00:00:00') * 1000) AS time, trades_total_count AS Trades, margin_net_change AS MarginNet FROM period_activity WHERE period_type='MONTH' ORDER BY period_end_date

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), c AS (SELECT contribution_date AS Dt, 'contrib' AS Item, round(amount,2) AS AmtSigned, 'contribution' AS Src FROM period_contributions WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY contribution_date DESC LIMIT 2), w AS (SELECT withdrawal_date AS Dt, 'withdraw' AS Item, round(amount,2) AS AmtSigned, 'withdrawal' AS Src FROM period_withdrawals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY withdrawal_date DESC LIMIT 2), t AS (SELECT (SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AS Dt, substr(symbol,1,8) AS Item, (buy_count + sell_count) AS AmtSigned, 'trade' AS Src FROM period_trades WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY (buy_count + sell_count) DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT Dt, Item, AmtSigned, Src FROM (SELECT * FROM c UNION ALL SELECT * FROM w UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t) ORDER BY Dt DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), c AS (SELECT contribution_date AS Dt, 'contrib' AS Item, round(amount,2) AS AmtSigned, 'contribution' AS Src FROM period_contributions WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY contribution_date DESC LIMIT 2), w AS (SELECT withdrawal_date AS Dt, 'withdraw' AS Item, round(amount,2) AS AmtSigned, 'withdrawal' AS Src FROM period_withdrawals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY withdrawal_date DESC LIMIT 2), t AS (SELECT (SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AS Dt, substr(symbol,1,8) AS Item, (buy_count + sell_count) AS AmtSigned, 'trade' AS Src FROM period_trades WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY (buy_count + sell_count) DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT Dt, Item, AmtSigned, Src FROM (SELECT * FROM c UNION ALL SELECT * FROM w UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t) ORDER BY Dt DESC LIMIT 5

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT substr(list_type,1,12) AS ListType, COUNT(*) AS Cnt, substr(group_concat(substr(symbol,1,4),','),1,18) AS Symbols, 'MONTH' AS PType FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) GROUP BY list_type ORDER BY Cnt DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT substr(list_type,1,12) AS ListType, COUNT(*) AS Cnt, substr(group_concat(substr(symbol,1,4),','),1,18) AS Symbols, 'MONTH' AS PType FROM period_position_lists WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) GROUP BY list_type ORDER BY Cnt DESC LIMIT 5

title: B08 LMI v3 - Period Activity
description: Completed-period flow board for contributions, withdrawals, trades, and position-list churn in one view.
